headline: US needs unified approach on AI companies competing with China
summary: American AI executives are speaking before lawmakers on Capitol Hill on Thursday about how the US can keep a competitive advantage against China. Chamber of Progress Founder and CEO Adam Kovacevich comes on Catalysts to speak more about how the second Trump administrations Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is approaching antitrust cases in Big Tech and the ongoing AI arms race with China.
